body.title: Inference router increment 2 — the stateless selector: two bucket-filters + argmin(dollars)
body.intention: I intend that per call the Proxy picks the cheapest capable source by a trivial rule over the schema, so cascades and the escalation fork both dissolve into one selector.
body.description:
**Problem:** the candidate sort (rules_engine.py:200-219) keys on a binary `billing_type` — replace it with the cost-optimizing selector over the increment-1 schema. This is increment 2 of D-inference-cost-optimizing-router. GATED on T-router-data-schema (needs the descriptor fields + mappers).
**Proposed shape — one trivial rule, all richness in the data:**
(a) **Filter** to sources whose `time_bucket` is eligible for the call's `eligible_time_bucket` AND whose `difficulty_capable >= ` the call's `difficulty_bucket` AND whose `features` cover the required features.
(b) **argmin(`dollars_per_unit`)** over survivors, keyed `(cost_class_rank(source.cost_class), model.dollars_per_unit, rule.priority)`; priority as the final tiebreak.
**FAILURE-BUMP DESCOPED (advisor 2026-06-30):** the selector is STATELESS. 'On mechanical failure bump difficulty and re-run' is a DISPATCH-loop concern, and device.py ALREADY owns escalation (escalation_hop / tier cascade) — reconciling with it requires reading escalation_hop first and is its own unit of work (moved to T-router-failure-bump-escalation). route() stays a pure per-call selector; a default urgency (foreground->interactive, else normal) means NO device.py change is needed to ship.
**Two INTENTIONAL behavior changes to own (not stumble into):** (1) `foreground` now filters by TIME only (interactive urgency), so when sources share a time_bucket it grants nothing and argmin picks the CHEAPEST — the OPPOSITE of the old 'foreground prefers OR'. Correct per the epic (capability=DIFFICULTY, speed=TIME; old foreground conflated them). (2) `google_free` (free_throttled=2) now ALWAYS beats `ollama_cloud` (subscription=3), where billing_type made them tie-by-priority. Both are the taxonomy fix landing — assert the NEW ordering, do not force the old winners.
**Hex-DOWN is not a branch:** an unavailable source is simply absent from the candidate set -> next-cheapest-capable wins automatically. The down raises a separate `system_alarm` (observability signal), never a routing conditional.
**Difficulty filter is a NEW exclusion:** difficulty_meets DROPS candidates the old code kept. Verify every production tier in _DEFAULT_RULES still resolves >=1 candidate (rules currently point task_classes at same-or-higher-tier models, which pass — verify, don't assume). SANITY ANCHOR: after this increment (pre-Hex), a `worker` call must still land on `google_free`.
**Retire:** the binary `billing_type` sort; the `foreground` inversion (rules_engine.py:205-212) -> REDEFINE foreground as 'permit a faster, costlier time-bucket for latency' (against time_bucket, not billing); the dead source name `local_ollama` (rules_engine.py:95-96) -> `ollama`.
**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/rules_engine.py (replace candidate sort with bucket-filter->argmin(dollars); add failure-bump re-run; redefine foreground; local_ollama->ollama).
**Design rules:** ALL inference through the Proxy; NO SQLite; log source/model/buckets/dollars at the crossing (schema from increment 1).
**Scope boundary:** the STATELESS selector ONLY. Failure-bump/escalation is DESCOPED to T-router-failure-bump-escalation. Populating real source numbers (Hex roster) is increment 3 (T-ds-local-ollama-route). Do NOT register models, set INFERENCE_ENDPOINT, or touch device.py dispatch here. NOTE: this reorders ALL routing (every tier/caller) — blast radius is the whole Proxy; migrate the existing flat_rate tests to the NEW ordering.
**Test plan (stub-first red->green):** (1) two capable sources differing only in dollars -> cheaper wins; (2) a cheap-but-wrong-time-bucket source is EXCLUDED for an interactive call, INCLUDED for overnight/batch urgency; (3) a source below the difficulty bucket is excluded; (4) source-absent (Hex down) -> next-cheapest-capable, no hard-fail; (5) foreground=interactive filters by time (a fast source beats a slow one under interactive urgency; NOT cost inversion); (6) google_free beats ollama_cloud (free_throttled < subscription); (7) EVERY production tier (minion/worker/analyst/designer) resolves >=1 candidate; (8) SANITY: worker call lands on google_free (pre-Hex live DS path preserved); (9) grep `local_ollama` -> 0 live refs; (10) migrated flat_rate tests assert the new ordering and pass.
**Completion criteria:** candidate selection is time-filter x difficulty-filter -> argmin(cost_class_rank, dollars_per_unit, priority); foreground redefined against time-bucket (no billing inversion); local_ollama gone; every production tier resolves a candidate; worker->google_free sanity holds; migrated + new tests green. Failure-bump is OUT (T-router-failure-bump-escalation).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Stateless cost-optimizing selector shipped: route() replaces the binary billing_type sort with TIME-eligibility x DIFFICULTY-capability filters then argmin(cost_class_rank, dollars_per_unit, priority). foreground redefined to time-only (no cost inversion); google_free (free_throttled) beats ollama_cloud (subscription); local_ollama->ollama; route() gains urgency + required_features. Failure-bump descoped to T-router-failure-bump-escalation. Proven red->green @8e814ad4; 114 routing tests green incl. migrated flat_rate + per-tier-resolves + worker->google_free sanity anchor.
